narrative:
White Eyes / Adams (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,140 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.6 percentage points.
